battle_companion_f9_f10.status: CODE+TESTS DONE; on-device re-test (Test18 APK) + git COMMIT PENDING
battle_companion_f9_f10.summary: Battle-Phase Companion sprint, Phase 4 = the integrated 5PFH PLAYED (non-auto-resolved) campaign battle, walked ON THE TABLET via ADB touch. Found+fixed two device-only bugs. F9 (HIGH): the Crew/Enemy Tracker SlideOverDrawer ScrollContainer won't vertical-touch-scroll on tablet; full-height struck-through dead-unit cards pushed the last live enemy's Mark-Down button off the viewport with no reachable control. Fix = collapse DOWN figures to a compact control-free row (TacticalBattleUI._build_downed_unit_row, branched in _populate_unit_drawer). F10 (HIGH, core-feature): a played LOG_ONLY campaign battle had NO reachable control to end the battle or declare the objective (BattleRoundTracker.end_battle() has ZERO callers; LOG_ONLY has no victory check; fast path forces COMBAT for every tier). Fix (user choice B): keep the full companion + add an always-reachable emerald Record Result button (_rebuild_drawer_toolbar landscape + _rebuild_panels_menu portrait) -> objective-aware BattleResultsInputForm -> tactical_battle_completed -> PostBattle; removed the LOG_ONLY skip in _on_checklist_dismissed. Form now makes mission success = declared objective outcome (Core Rules p.90), not the Won/Lost proxy.
battle_companion_f9_f10.test_status: 9/9 new green (test_battle_results_input_form 6, test_tactical_downed_unit_row 3); 55 existing battle suites still green (64 total); headless compile clean

pending: Test18 APK build (c:/tmp/fiveparsecs_Test18.apk) was running in background at handoff
adb install -r Test18 + fresh played battle: mark down (compact rows) -> Record Result -> declare Deliver achieved -> PostBattle, capture on-device visuals
git commit (4 edits + 2 new test files, all uncommitted)

portrait_density_slider_hybrid.summary: Portrait mobile de-clip via a slider-first hybrid strategy (research-backed: uniform scale-down fails for data-dense UIs due to 44/48dp touch + ~16-17pt text floors; the UI-scale slider is the COMPLEMENT, not a substitute; 360dp design floor ~321px). Dashboard de-clip 110px->0 offenders @360, pixel-identical @1280. NEW MobileAppBar.gd (portrait top bar that REPARENTS the Story Points + help buttons in/out) + PortraitChrome.gd (self-wiring margin-trim helper, wired into Ship/Equipment/CampaignEvents/Advancement/PatronRival). EquipmentManager Controls HBox->HFlowContainer (the 571px clip). CampaignDashboard._apply_portrait_chrome(); CampaignScreenBase.get_safe_area_insets() (no-op desktop, device-ready). 3 gotchas banked: %UniqueName breaks after reparent-under-runtime-node; new class_name needs load() not bare id; MEASURE the real overflow driver first.
portrait_density_slider_hybrid.review: Adversarial workflow (3 agents, 0 blockers, 3 high): 2 real improvements applied+verified (capture-original-margin, type _app_bar as MobileAppBarClass), 1 rejected with reasoning (orphan case can't occur; suggested fix was buggier).
deferred_to_followup: PreBattle 8-col enemy stat table (needs horizontal-scroll wrapper; radios already autowrap-fixed)
PatronRivalManager threat_level runtime bug (PRE-EXISTING, halts --debug; blocked its MCP verification)
On-device safe-area/touch/DPI validation (all testing was Windows desktop, screen_get_scale=1.0)

sheet_export_sprint_2_5.summary: CV-based field-rect calibration for printable sheets. tools/extract_sheet_fields.py uses Pillow + NumPy color-mask + connected-component flood-fill to detect every cyan-bordered field on a blank sheet PNG. tools/assign_crew_log_ids.py is the per-sheet layout-aware ID-assignment helper that maps detected rects to semantic IDs + source dot-paths. Crew Log went from 14 starter fields to 144 calibrated fields (16 header + 8 character slots * 16 fields). MCP debug overlay confirms red rects align cleanly to printed cyan field outlines. 28/28 gdUnit4 tests pass.
files_modified: src/ui/components/sheet/SheetRenderer.gd (_background.show_behind_parent = true z-order fix so _draw() debug overlay renders on top of PNG)
.gitignore (tools/_debug/ entry; note: /tools/ itself is also gitignored)
runtime_bugs_fixed: Debug overlay invisible: SheetRenderer._draw() runs on parent Control which renders BEFORE children. Fixed by setting _background.show_behind_parent = true on the TextureRect so the PNG sits behind the parent's draw output. Anti-pattern: any Control with _draw() output + visual children must explicitly mark those children show_behind_parent.
deferred_to_followup_sprint: tools/assign_world_record_ids.py (~20 fields including octagonal Yes/Obtained/No checkboxes)
Data-population verification: run a real campaign through Save PDF and visually confirm each of 144 fields renders correctly
Resolver .size / count_of: extension for patron/rival numeric counts

narrative_system_phase1.summary: King-of-Dragon-Pass-style full-screen narrative event overlay integrated into Story Track. NarrativeScreen extends CanvasLayer at layer 95 (between L80/90 chrome and L100 TransitionManager), wraps UI in _root Control at PRESET_FULL_RECT. Story Track events with `SettingsManager.are_narrative_events_enabled()` true (default) open the narrative window; off-path falls through to legacy card UI in StoryPhasePanel.
files_created: data/narrative/atmosphere_openers.json (5 categories + 12 trait modifiers + art_tag map)
data/narrative/advisor_quotes.json (6 roles x 3 moods x 1 quote scaffold)
files_modified: src/autoload/SettingsManager.gd (use_narrative_events: true in DEFAULTS.gameplay + are_narrative_events_enabled() accessor)
runtime_bugs_fixed: First MCP screenshot showed MainMenu, not overlay — Control extension rendered behind MainMenu's CanvasLayers L80/L90. Fixed: extends CanvasLayer, layer = 95, UI wrapped in _root Control.

Resource file not found: res://assets/portraits/default.png — SpeciesPortraitRegistry.DEFAULT_PORTRAIT points at unshipped art. Fixed: ResourceLoader.exists(pp) guard before load(pp) in _apply_advisor_portrait.

Can't use get_node() with absolute paths from outside the active scene tree — tree_exited fires AFTER detachment, breaking /root/PersistentResourceBar restore. Fixed: override _exit_tree() instead, fires while still in tree.
deferred_to_phase_2_plus: Settings UI checkbox for the toggle (currently .cfg only)
Real SceneStage manifests for story_event_01..07 (gradient fallback renders today)
Quote pool expansion beyond 1-per-cell (18 quotes scaffold)
Polish: typewriter, Ken Burns, atmosphere overlay, audio (Phase 6)
narrative_system_phase1.agent_ownership: ui-panel-developer owns src/ui/screens/narrative/ + data/narrative/ (see ui-development skill, narrative-screen.md reference)

recent_engineering_qa.summary: Battle Screen UX/UI Redesign (Map-Primary + Drawers) — Phase 0 prototype + Phase 1 frame port + Phase 2 per-figure bookkeeping ALL COMPLETE & runtime-verified across all 3 tiers and 4 entry points (Battle Sim, Bug Hunt, Planetfall, Tactics). Plan: C:\Users\admin\.claude\plans\i-think-i-got-binary-comet.md. Design-spec/QA reference: docs/testing/BATTLE_UI_REDESIGN.md (indexed). Keeper widget: src/ui/components/common/SlideOverDrawer.gd (gdUnit 10/10). Phase 2 wired per-figure SSOT: TacticalUnit gained stun_markers/is_activated/react_slot + reset_for_new_round() (enemies react_slot=3); Crew/Enemy SlideOverDrawers ARE the per-figure tracker (CharacterStatusCard + Mark-Down per TacticalUnit); card buttons → _on_card_damage/stun/action → mutate model + log + ActivationTrackerPanel; _mark_casualty is single idempotent chokepoint with iter-3 morale bridge; rails got stun pips/Q-S chip/activated-recede/casualty styling + live ACTIVATED a/M · Q · S header + ↺ Round reset + this-round-casualties line; round machine: _reset_all_unit_reactions keeps Stun (Core Rules: removed only after acting), _assign_crew_reaction_slots at REACTION_ROLL (D6 vs Reactions → Q/S), _resolve_end_phase_morale at END_PHASE (Core Rules pp.114-115). User-confirmed RULES-FAITHFUL crew injury routing (Core Rules p.122): _resolve_battle() now routes ALL downed crew to crew_injuries_data → standard post-battle Injury Table decides dead/injured/recovered (was forced harsh Severity sub-path); enemies still die outright + feed morale. SlideOverDrawer wide-drawer pattern: opt-in @export min_panel_width (default 0 = unchanged keeper contract), wide drawers (Crew/Enemies/Dice/Tracking/Oracle/Results) = 480px CONTENT-sized (minf(min_panel_width, vp.x*0.5)) NOT viewport fraction (initial vp.x*0.42 attempt ballooned to 828px on 1972 screen = half-takeover; corrected). Post-battle + turn-rollover consistency VERIFIED end-to-end after the routing change.
found_and_fixed_bugs: Phase 2 ordering: drawers built in initialize_battle BEFORE tier pick → activation_tracker null → units never registered (set_unit_defeated push_warning). Fixed by repopulating in _on_tier_selected after ASSISTED engines instance.

Pre-existing InjurySystemService.gd:63 (untouched since 2026-04-02, NOT a Phase 2 regression): result.description = range_data.description but INJURY_ROLL_RANGES entries are {min, max} only → SCRIPT ERROR spam + blank injury descriptions on every post-battle injury roll (NOT a hard crash — Godot continues past Dictionary missing-key; is_fatal/recovery_turns stayed correct; debugger-break was MCP run_script debug-mode artifact). Fixed → InjurySystemConstants.get_injury_description(injury_type), mirroring adjacent type_name lookup, no fabricated data. Surfaced BECAUSE rules-faithful routing now sends 100% downed crew through this path.
recent_engineering_qa.tests: Battle UI suites all pass: keeper SlideOverDrawer 10/10 (unchanged default contract); test_activation_tracker 12/12; test_battle_objective_tracker 14/14; test_post_battle_success_cascade 4/4; test_battle_tier_controller 13/13; test_injury_determination 13/13; test_injury_recovery 15/15; test_post_battle_subsystems 10/10. ONE PRE-EXISTING FAIL OUT OF SCOPE: test_battle_round_tracker::test_battle_event_triggers_on_round_2 — BattleRoundTracker.gd unchanged by this plan (commit dbf9980d), stale test expects bare advance_phase()×5 to auto-emit but tracker requires UI check_battle_event() after overlay (line ~186) to avoid modal double-fire. Track separately. MCP empirical: card→model SSOT (stun/damage/action), Reaction Roll Q/S (15/100 fatal, 50/100 recovery, 35/100 no-effect via determine_injury sweep), round reset KEEPS stun, iter-3 morale bridge + bail removal, all 4 entry-point battle_mode branches load+populate.
recent_engineering_qa.files_modified: src/ui/screens/battle/TacticalBattleUI.gd (Phase 2 fields/methods + wide _make_drawer + crew injury routing in _resolve_battle), src/ui/components/common/SlideOverDrawer.gd (min_panel_width @export + _lr_width helper), src/core/services/InjurySystemService.gd (line ~63 description fix). Created: docs/testing/BATTLE_UI_REDESIGN.md (indexed in docs/DOCUMENTATION_INDEX.md). Deleted: src/ui/screens/battle/prototype/ (untracked throwaway, never committed).
recent_engineering_qa.lessons_recorded: (1) GDScript does NOT hot-reload in a running Godot instance — must stop_project+run_project after .gd edit or MCP verifies stale bytecode (first re-probe showed stale 828px width). (2) Content-driven widgets size to CONTENT not viewport — fraction-of-screen sizing balloons on wide monitors. (3) Green unit tests ≠ exercised runtime path — gdUnit injury_determination 13/13 passed before AND after the InjurySystemService:63 fix because the test doesn't trip the SCRIPT-ERROR line; only the empirical d100 sweep caught it. (4) Plan-listed steps can already be SATISFIED by existing code (Seize Initiative was already a one-time pre-computed briefing affordance — adding a new button would have duplicated). (5) Context7-verify Godot built-in API surface (not project-internal components) before claiming engine-level coverage.
recent_engineering_qa.uncommitted: Tree clean — commit 1305d22d swept up the Phase 2 + follow-up work mid-session. Only .claude/skills/campaign-systems/references/save-load-persistence.md modified (stale from May 17, not this session).
recent_engineering_qa.cross_mode: All 4 entry-point battle_mode branches MCP-verified (Bug Hunt/Planetfall/Tactics via preserved _try_auto_init_from_temp_data delegation; standalone Battle Sim direct). _is_bug_hunt_mode/_is_planetfall_mode flags set correctly per mode, drawers populate identically across all four.

current_phase: Phase A.1 — Modiphius Partnership Workback (post Apr 29 meeting + Apr 30 forecast deep-dive + Apr 30 forecast delivery prep). DEAL FRAME LOCKED: 5PFH 4,219 DTRPG / 30K phys, 5L 2,700 DTRPG / 20K phys, 50/50 net split, 5x system as foundation for Modiphius's wider digital strategy. FOUR MUTUALLY AGREED STRATEGIC THESES (T1-T4) captured Apr 30: T1 companion app not digital port, T2 establishing a category not entering one, T3 multi-project platform R&D investment, T4 active digital→physical conversion strategy. See MEETING_FOLLOWUPS_2026-04-29.md §1.5 for canonical statement. Apr 30 forecast deep-dive (MODIPHIUS_DIGITAL_FORECAST.md): Steam-first refocus (0.72 → 0.70 multiplier, mobile = Phase 2 pocket port), §11 industry research (7 subsections, 30+ sourced URLs covering Steam tabletop comps, wishlist conversion, EA risk, pricing psychology, cannibalization, TTRPG market tailwinds), §11.5a five-mechanism digital→physical strategy, §11.1 right-comparison-vector restructure. Phase A.1 deliverables UPDATED Apr 30: forecast doc has +2,500 words industry research, CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md adds §6.1 category-perception probe + §6.5 digital→physical mechanism specs (Phase B alpha deliverables). FORECAST SENT TO MODIPHIUS 2026-04-30: 1-page executive summary PDF (rendered from docs/MODIPHIUS_FORECAST_SUMMARY.md) + current Windows build .exe sent to Chris (CC Gavin) via Gmail. Email body archived at docs/EMAIL_DRAFT_FORECAST_DELIVERY.txt. Full forecast PDF (rendered from docs/MODIPHIUS_DIGITAL_FORECAST.md) staged in reserve for instant send-on-request. Spot-check completed pre-send: Section D contractor frames mapping corrected (Frame A has $100K-$180K break-even range; Frames B+C are pure additional cost, no break-even — earlier draft conflated frames with §9b structures). Reusable renderer at scripts/render_md_to_print_html.py (Pandoc-free, browser Print-to-PDF flow). Awaiting Modiphius reply — log responses in MEETING_FOLLOWUPS_2026-04-29.md §9 tracking table. Next: Phase A.2 (May 5-11) external preliminary planning — first weekly Gavin sync, partnership-on-paper conversation, contractor scope discussion (Frame B retainer is recommended lead), discount-code sizing coordination for T4 mechanisms. Steam EA target late Sep 2026. ENGINEERING (2026-05-27): SceneStage character slots (roster-aware crew figures, tree-order depth) + ambient 'living painting' motion SHIPPED as a PoC on story_event_01 (one-pager screenshot sent to Modiphius). Authoring SOP at docs/sop/narrative-scene-authoring.md. NEW SPRINT ROADMAP at docs/SPRINT_ROADMAP_NARRATIVE_COMBAT.md decomposes narrative integration (A1-A5) + combat modes (B0-B4); LEAD SPRINT chosen = B0+B1 No-Minis combat foundation (battle-systems-engineer; fidelity-check BattleResolver vs Nominis.json, then wire). See project_sprint_roadmap_narrative_combat memory.

roadmap.next_priority: Phase A.2 (May 5-11): first weekly Gavin sync, partnership-on-paper conversation (LOI), contractor scope discussion (Frames A/B/C — lead with Frame B retainer per §9.5), asset delivery begins, telemetry scaffolding code, Van Westendorp Prolific recruitment, T4 discount-code sizing coordination with Modiphius (15-20% placeholder), T4 newsletter API endpoint coordination, Steam wishlist target setting (10K-20K by EA per §11.2). Phase A.3 (May 12-24): cut alpha branch, A0 sanity-check, tester onboarding, T4 mechanism mock-ups in build, category-perception probe questions finalized. Alpha kickoff Mon May 25.
roadmap.modiphius_partnership_status: DEAL FRAME LOCKED 2026-04-29: 50/50 net split after platform fees. Steam-first launch (Apr 30 refocus): Phase 1 EA + 1.0 on Steam exclusively, mobile pocket edition is Phase 2 post-1.0. FOUR MUTUALLY AGREED STRATEGIC THESES (T1-T4) baseline: T1 companion app not digital port, T2 establishing a category not entering one, T3 multi-project platform R&D investment, T4 active digital→physical conversion strategy. Contractor structures on table (Frames A/B/C in MODIPHIUS_DIGITAL_FORECAST.md §9.5 — recommended pitch sequence leads with Frame B retainer, then Frame C hybrid, Frame A intro fee as max ask, pure 50/50 as fallback). Partnership-on-paper progression: LOI in Phase A.2 → MOU during alpha + refinement → Definitive Agreement before Steam EA. 5x system positioned as foundation for Modiphius's wider digital strategy across other licensed IPs (Star Trek Adventures, Achtung Cthulhu, Fallout, Dune).

strategic_theses.T1_companion_not_port: App complements physical book, doesn't replace it. Different evaluation lens than Gloomhaven-style digital replacements. See MODIPHIUS_DIGITAL_FORECAST.md §11.5.
strategic_theses.T2_category_establishment: Solo-RPG/wargame digital companion apps essentially absent on Steam. 5PFH builds the precedent. Empty-Steam-category = both moat AND discovery risk. See forecast §11.1d. Validated via closed alpha category-perception probe (CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md §6.1).
strategic_theses.T3_platform_RnD_investment: Build is foundation for Modiphius's digital strategy across other licensed IPs. Reframes contractor scope from per-product cost to platform investment. See forecast §9.5 multi-project reframe.
strategic_theses.T4_digital_to_physical_strategy: 5 in-app conversion mechanisms drive Steam users to physical book purchases (discount code, Get-the-Physical-Edition CTA, bundled-PDF reminder, expansion pre-order incentives, newsletter capture). Inverts the standard cannibalization concern. Modiphius keeps 100% physical margin. See forecast §11.5a + CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md §6.5 (Phase B alpha deliverables).

phase_B_alpha_deliverables_apr30.category_perception_probe: CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md §6.1 — open-ended language probe + forced-choice category labels + Steam discovery hypothetical. Output: docs/CATEGORY_PERCEPTION_REPORT.md at end of alpha. Feeds Phase C Steam-store-positioning brief.
phase_B_alpha_deliverables_apr30.digital_to_physical_mechanism_specs: CLOSED_ALPHA_PLAN.md §6.5 — design and prototype 5 mechanisms before alpha kickoff so testers can react. Coordination needed with Modiphius: discount sizing, redemption mechanism, co-branded landing page, newsletter API endpoint.
